notes: Was immediately crashing until I enabled "PROTON_NO_ESYNC": "1". It launched after that, but it was immediately apparent there were some assets missing or some rendering issues as the main menu is mostly black. Going into Options seems to work, except you can't see a lot of it. Choosing New Game caused the game to crash.
title: Stranger of Sword City / 剣の街の異邦人 ～黒の宮殿～

notes: The game wouldn't start initially ( a black app window would form then disappear).  Used "winetricks xact" in the Proton prefix and now it works fine including audio with keyboard and mouse.  I also wanted Steam Controller support and this required "winetricks dinput8", after which this also worked (without the fix the cursor would endlessly move up at the main menu screen).  No other issues detected so far.
title: Stranger of Sword City / 剣の街の異邦人 ～黒の宮殿～

notes: Works out of the box. There are graphic glitches in the menus.
title: Stranger of Sword City / 剣の街の異邦人 ～黒の宮殿～
